overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western action game showing a cowboy character walking through the rainy streets of Saint Denis at night. The character follows train tracks through muddy roads illuminated by warm street lamps, passing wooden fences, market signs, and brick walls before reaching an open intersection with a large building.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy street with train tracks and wooden fences

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the train tracks through the rainy street, passing the Saint Denis Market sign

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street from left to right, passing the character

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence running alongside the right side of the tracks
metal railway tracks embedded in the muddy street surface
painted wooden sign reading SAINT DENIS MARKET on the building wall
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light illuminating the rain
wooden wagon with white canvas cover pulled by horses

segments.scene_description: The character walks along muddy train tracks in a narrow street flanked by a wooden fence on the right and buildings on the left. Warm street lamps illuminate the heavy rain, and a Saint Denis Market sign is visible on the left building. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left midway through the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick wall corridor along train tracks with utility poles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tracks past the red brick wall with No Entry painted on it

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial wall with arched doorways
white painted text reading NO ENTRY on the brick wall
wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the tracks beside a tall brick wall on the right featuring a No Entry sign. The street remains narrow and enclosed, with wooden utility poles lining the path ahead. The rain continues to fall heavily under the artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with large two-story wooden building

events.description: character slows and turns left toward the large wooden building at the intersection

agents.ego_description: reaching the open intersection and turning left to approach the large two-story building with lit windows

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with wrap-around porch and multiple lit windows
dark stormy sky visible overhead as the street opens up

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wide intersection with full view of the stormy sky. The character turns left toward a large two-story wooden building with warm lights glowing from its windows and porch. The train tracks continue into the distance as the character approaches the building's entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, rain-slicked alleyway that gradually opens into a wide urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along muddy train tracks flanked by a wooden fence and buildings, where warm street lamps illuminate the heavy rain and a Saint Denis Market sign. As the character proceeds, the environment becomes more enclosed beside a tall brick wall featuring a No Entry sign and a line of wooden utility poles. The scene then expands as the narrow street gives way to a wide intersection under a stormy sky, before turning left toward a large two-story wooden building with glowing windows. The movement finally concludes as the character approaches the building's entrance while the tracks stretch out into the distance.
